title: HTML & CSS Integration Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential ways to connect CSS with your HTML documents.

questions.question: Which tag is used to reference an external CSS file in an HTML document?
Which of these is the industry-standard way to include CSS in a large web project?
If a style is defined both in an external CSS file and in an inline style on a tag, which one takes higher priority?
options: It depends on the tag name.

questions.question: Where should the <link> tag for an external CSS file normally be placed?
options: At the bottom of the <body> tag.

questions.question: Which of these is a disadvantage of using inline CSS styles (style='...')?
options: They are not supported by mobile browsers.
They make it difficult to maintain and update styles across multiple pages.
They are only visible to search engines.
They require a separate server to load.
